zh.Treloy, St Issey, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾聖 易斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Renfred Arundell於1245年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾時，他的父親Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory27歲，母親Eva Roche17歲。他和Alice de Lanherne至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1280年12月15日在英國可瓦爾享年35歲。

zh-hans.Treloy, St Issey, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾聖 易斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Renfred Arundell于1245年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory27岁，母亲Eva Roche17岁。他和Alice de Lanherne至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1280年12月15日在英国可瓦爾享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arundell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Arundel
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

nameMeanings.name: Renfred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire and Lanarkshire): habitational name from Renfrew (Renfrewshire), named with a British term cognate with Welsh rhynfrwd ‘point of current’.

variants.name: Renfro
meanings: English (Devon): from the Middle English personal name Reinfrid (ancient Germanic Ragin-, Raganfrid from ragin ‘counsel, decision’ + frid ‘peace’). This surname is now rare in Britain.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Renfred Arundell was born in 1245, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory, was 27 and his mother, Eva Roche, was 17. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Alice de Lanherne. He died on 15 December 1280, in Cornwall, England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Renfred Arundell est né en 1245, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Eva Roche, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Alice de Lanherne. Il est décédé le 15 décembre 1280, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Renfred Arundell 1245 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory 27 und seine Mutter Eva Roche 17. Er hatte mit Alice de Lanherne mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Dezember 1280 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Renfred Arundell è nato il nel 1245 nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Eva Roche, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Alice de Lanherne. Morì il 15 dicembre 1280, nel Cornwall, England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.Treloy, St Issey, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルスト イセイ
ja.Treloy, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワル
ja.Lanherne, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルランハーン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Renfred Arundellが1245年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Treloryは27歳，母Eva Rocheは17歳であった。彼はAlice de Lanherneとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1280年12月15日にイギリスコルンワルで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Renfred Arundell(이)가 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva Roche(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Alice de Lanherne(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1280년 12월 15일 영국 코른월에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Renfred Arundell nasceu em 1245, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Eva Roche, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Alice de Lanherne. Ele faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1280, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Renfred Arundell родился в 1245 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva Roche, 17. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Alice de Lanherne. Он умер 15 декабря 1280 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Renfred Arundell nació en 1245, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph Arundell Lord of Trelory, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Eva Roche, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Alice de Lanherne. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1280, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
